name: Chicken and Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into serving pieces and wash and pat dry.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. In a skillet, heat butter, garlic, and 2/3 of the oil over medium heat.
4. Brown the chicken on both sides for about 10 minutes.
5. Lower the heat and continue cooking the chicken for another 25 minutes.
6. In a separate skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of oil.
7. Sauté onions until translucent, about 5 minutes.
8. Add mushrooms and 2 tablespoons of water; simmer for 10 minutes.
9. Add the sautéed onions with mushrooms to the chicken.
10. Cover and simmer the chicken for an additional 15 minutes.
11. Pour in the sherry and heat briefly until it comes to a boil for about 1 minute before serving hot.
